_meta.purpose: Material context for Marion, sourced from Freudenberg Sealing Technologies brochures. Provides operating-envelope and chemical-resistance context to support material-selection reasoning. NOT a parent-profile or part-number mapping. Vendor material names (e.g. Simriz, Fluoroprene XP, AU 30000) are Freudenberg-branded; treat as descriptive context, not Fluidseal equivalents.
_meta.use: Referenced by markets.json via material keys. When Marion reasons about a market's operating conditions, it can pull the matching material envelope here.
_meta.disclaimer: Specs are as-published by Freudenberg for their named compounds. Use as directional guidance for the material FAMILY; do not quote Freudenberg compound numbers as Fluidseal/SSG product specs.

temp_range_C.note: Range varies by compound; Simriz 498 rated to 325C, standard grades to ~230C, low-temp grades from -30C

strengths: Broadest chemical resistance of any elastomer
Superior compression set at high temp
Wide temperature span in a single material
Resistance to mineral and biodegradable fluids
Reduces SKU count by covering many needs with one material

typical_use: Hydraulic cylinder piston seals in heavy mobile equipment under high pressure

temp_range_C.note: Up to 160C in hot water and steam; gamma-ray resistant

strengths: Broad chemical and thermal resistance with a single material
Hot water and steam to ~145C in beverage service
Good for polar media, steam, water

PTFE_and_variants.vendor_brand: incl. Y005 guide-band compound, FEP/PFA encapsulation casings
PTFE_and_variants.temp_note: Guide-band compound Y005 validated at 80C and 120C; FEP encapsulation to ~205C, PFA to ~260C
strengths: Used as encapsulation casing over FKM or silicone cores
caveats: Pure PTFE cold-flows under sustained pressure
Encapsulated O-rings are static-only, not for dynamic/abrasive/high-pressure use
typical_use: Chemical seals (bellows, chevron, guide rings, U-cups)

strengths: Common core material for encapsulated O-rings
Workhorse for fuel, oil, and aggressive-fluid service
typical_use: General high-temp dynamic and static sealing

strengths: Tailored for wind-turbine main-bearing shaft seals
typical_use: Wind turbine main bearing / driveshaft seals (Seventomatic)
